steps.title: Compare the added plant
steps.content: Maya's $78$ plant masses are all between $3.1$ kg and $7.4$ kg. The additional plant Omar examined has mass $12.6$ kg, which is greater than every plant in Maya's set.

steps.title: Use the mean rule
steps.content: Adding a value greater than the current mean increases the mean. Since $12.6$ is greater than every original value, it is also greater than Maya's mean.

steps.title: Identify what must be true
steps.content: Omar's mean must be greater than Maya's mean. The answer is D.
